features.title: Rust workspace
acceptance_criteria: All five foundation crates compile in the pinned workspace.

features.title: Pinned toolchain and quality baseline
acceptance_criteria: Locked builds, formatting, linting, logging, and environment templates pass.

features.title: Developer command contract
acceptance_criteria: Build, test, local-lab, local-stack, and headless commands are documented.

features.title: Continuous integration
acceptance_criteria: CI gates format, lint, tests, content validation, trace replay, and Windows release build.

features.title: Deterministic 30 Hz simulation
acceptance_criteria: Fixed-step clock and named ChaCha8 streams reproduce identical results.

features.title: Stable IDs and feature registry
acceptance_criteria: Invalid or duplicate content, entity, and feature IDs fail validation.

features.title: Minimum content schemas
acceptance_criteria: Strict versioned schemas and semantic references validate the exact M01 domains.

features.title: Deterministic trace runner
acceptance_criteria: Fixed input produces the checked-in selected-tick BLAKE3 hashes.

features.title: Bevy camera and world units
acceptance_criteria: The 32 by 24 northwest-origin arena renders with one tile equal to one simulation unit.

features.title: Input map and player movement
acceptance_criteria: Rebind-ready actions drive normalized 5.1 tiles-per-second movement without diagonal gain.

features.title: Mouse aim and held primary fire
acceptance_criteria: Held primary fire aims at the cursor and obeys the equipped crossbow interval.

features.title: Projectile and hitbox collision
acceptance_criteria: Narrow bolts collide deterministically with solids and the first enemy hurtbox.

features.title: Grave Mark
acceptance_criteria: Grave Mark applies the exact single-target duration, damage, and primary bonus.

features.title: Slipstep and Exhaustion
acceptance_criteria: Slipstep uses the exact travel, reduction, empowered shot, cooldown, and Exhaustion values.

features.title: Stillness and HUD state
acceptance_criteria: Focused activates and breaks at exact thresholds and its state is visible in the HUD.

features.title: Drowned Pilgrim record
acceptance_criteria: The Drowned Pilgrim state machine and three-shot fan match CONT-FP-004.

features.title: Bell Reed record
acceptance_criteria: The Bell Reed rotating gap ring and first/repeated warnings match CONT-FP-004.

features.title: Chain Sentry record
acceptance_criteria: The Chain Sentry alternates exact cardinal and diagonal lane casts.

features.title: Pattern primitives and timeline
acceptance_criteria: Aimed fan, gap ring, and cross-lane primitives schedule on integer ticks.

features.title: Bell Proctor phase one
acceptance_criteria: Phase one executes its exact 7200 millisecond fan/fan/ring loop.

features.title: Bell Proctor phases two and three
acceptance_criteria: Threshold breaks, cancellation, all later timelines, memory previews, and enrage match CONT-FP-005.

features.title: Health and damage order
acceptance_criteria: Health, armor, damage types, modifiers, bands, and equal-tick ordering follow the GDD.

features.title: Telegraph and threat validator
acceptance_criteria: Build validation rejects illegal warning, speed, gap, density, or simultaneous-threat values.

features.title: Local-lab death transaction
acceptance_criteria: Death clears the prototype run and restores control in a new run within three seconds.

features.title: Cause-of-death UI and restart
acceptance_criteria: Death names the lethal source and provides a deterministic restart flow.

features.title: Item instance and four slots
acceptance_criteria: Weapon, Relic, Armor, and Charm equip deterministically with an eight-slot prototype backpack.

features.title: Prototype item catalog and rewards
acceptance_criteria: All twelve equipment templates, Red Tonic, and five reward tables match the content specification.

features.title: Hitbox spawn and seed debug overlay
acceptance_criteria: Debug overlay displays hitboxes, spawn anchors, active threats, and the selected seed.

features.title: Time-scale and invulnerability tools
acceptance_criteria: Debug-only time scale and invulnerability controls never alter release behavior.

features.title: Projectile performance fixture
acceptance_criteria: The repeatable density benchmark reports stable projectile counts, frame time, and simulation cost.

features.title: Accessibility effect controls
acceptance_criteria: Colorblind-safe hostile projectile themes and reduced-effect controls preserve distinct, readable attack shapes in the complete Combat Laboratory.

features.title: Playtest telemetry and survey build
acceptance_criteria: The frozen build records its build/content version and privacy-safe cohort evidence, captures uncoached death-cause and voluntary-restart observations, and produces the First Playable feel survey and gate report.

features.title: Red Tonic belt use and feedback
acceptance_criteria: Red Tonic consumes one belt item, restores exactly 30% maximum health over 400 milliseconds without damage interruption, enforces the exact two-second shared cooldown and stack-six rules, and provides readable audio and UI feedback across death and restart.

features.title: First Playable gate
acceptance_criteria: A player can complete or die in the full local three-wave and Bell Proctor loop with all M01 fixtures passing.
